title: About the log4j vulnerability (CVE-2021-44228)
body:
Hello
I'm the one who recently started using skopeo 1.0.0.
This is a question without a good understanding of the contents.

-Is it affected by the log4j vulnerability (CVE-2021-44228) while using skopeo1.0.0?

It seems that no one is asking here, so I don't think there is a problem, but I would appreciate it if you could answer it just in case.

Best regards,

comments.body: Thanks for reaching out. Skopeo is _not_ affected by this vulnerability.

Thank you for your reply.

I was relieved to hear that it would not affect me.
